title: Amazing view of Mt. Rainier - Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: # Amazing view of Mt. Rainier - Smith Tower Visitor Experience. **#10** of 192 Sights & Landmarks in Seattle. *   Image 5 2 ### Seattle's Original Guided Harbor Cruise 4.7 (856) from $46. # Amazing view of Mt. Rainier. Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience. We had planned to go to the Space Needle until we heard that this place has just as good (if not better) view, at a fraction of the cost, and wait. In fact, we had no wait at all, and there was only 1 other couple up on the observation deck when we got there. We were lucky to come on an unseasonably clear and sunny day and got a magnificent view of Mt. Rainier. The price of admission is a bargain compared to the Space Needle. Although everyone should make the obligatory trip up the Space Needle, the Smith Tower is a much better experience and only half the price.
